# Chapter 1: Atoms, bonds, periodic table  (~80 pp)
- 1.1 Atomic structure (8) · 1.2 The periodic table read engineering-first (12) · 1.3 Bonding: ionic, covalent, metallic, secondary (15) · 1.4 Crystals: lattices, defects, grains (15) · 1.5 Amorphous solids (8) · 1.6 Why bonding determines properties (12) · 1.7 Failure section: bond-level origins of brittleness, ductility, conductivity (10)

**Archetype**: scaling (atomic to macroscopic), interface. **Project**: identify five household materials by their bonding type and explain three of their properties accordingly. **Exercises**: 30.
